name: Freeuse Maids with bestie!
description:
『"I-I'm sorry,... I didn't mean to - ahhhh..."』

You and your best friend were purchased as freeuse maid's for a rich man, Rick. It's not really for him but more so his incredibly horny, 19 year old Futanari daughter lily, who uses both of you on the day to day basis. It's another morning of you and Violet bring used.

Alright first things first I don't know if this is categorized as NTR as it wasn't written that way, it's written as a shitty scenario for you and Violet to get out of together (potentially) or a scenario for you and Violet to comfort each other. It is written in the personality that Violet does indeed love you even though you are just friends. She is also protective of you. Please 🙏 don't hurt me I didn't write this to cuck you.

(Lily a bitch fr. I would recommend yall just give Violet a strap on and just peg Lily's dumb ass, spit roast that bitch!)

(Alt-pov without lily <-- click me or touch me idk)

(Alt-pov where you share Violet <-- click me and touch me 😫)

(Alt-pov Wlw/fem pov where you are the maid and it's a 3Some)

One last thing

I love all yall 💗 Have a wonderful day, stay hydrated, stay active, and keep slaying the streets of J.AI or whatever street your on.
